OBJECTIVE
Electrical Engineering student seeking a summer internship in IC design,
photonics, or FPGA development.

EDUCATION
University of California, Berkeley | B.S. Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences | 2026
GPA: 3.85 / 4.00
Relevant Coursework: Digital Integrated Circuits, Solid-State Devices, Photonics, VLSI Design

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python, C++, Verilog, SystemVerilog, MATLAB
EDA / Simulation: Cadence Virtuoso, HSPICE, ModelSim, Vivado, Lumerical, COMSOL
Fab / Lab: Photolithography, Cleanroom Processes, SEM, AFM, Reactive-Ion Etching
Methodologies: Digital Design, Mixed-Signal, RTL, FPGA, PCB Design

PROJECTS
8-bit ALU in Verilog | Spring 2025
  Designed and verified an 8-bit ALU in SystemVerilog with a UVM testbench.
  Tools: SystemVerilog, ModelSim, Vivado.

Photonic Ring Resonator Simulation | Fall 2024
  Simulated a silicon photonic ring resonator in Lumerical with COMSOL thermal coupling.
  Achieved Q-factor of 12,000 in simulation; submitted to undergraduate symposium.

RESEARCH EXPERIENCE
Undergraduate Research Assistant | Berkeley Wireless Research Center | Jun 2024 – Present
  Built mixed-signal SPICE testbenches for low-power ADC characterization.
  Improved PSRR measurement automation by 40% via a Python+VISA harness.

WORK EXPERIENCE
FPGA Engineering Intern | NovaSemi Inc. | May 2023 – Aug 2023
  Implemented a SerDes equalizer block in SystemVerilog targeting Xilinx UltraScale+.
  Wrote constrained-random tests covering 95% of the block's RTL paths.

INTERESTS
Amateur radio (KK6XYZ) · Cycling · Mechanical keyboards
